objective: Develop a leakage-controlled sequence/monomer-structure surrogate for R_dual_min using only the 226 OPEN_TRAIN candidates, with parent-cluster nested cross-validation and no re-use of OPEN_DEVELOPMENT labels.
claim_boundary: Development-only approximation of independent dual-receptor computational docking geometry. Not Docking Gold, binding probability, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, or final submission authority.

label_free_structure_features.allowed_rows_for_fitting: candidate IDs present in the OPEN_TRAIN-only table

forbidden_inputs: V4-F test32 sequences, structures, predictions, or labels
V4-H docking statuses, poses, scores, contacts, occlusion, or derived labels

features.standardization: fit separately inside each training fold only

models.M5_structure_plus_sequence_residual: M2 plus gamma times a sequence Ridge trained on cross-fitted M2 residuals

nested_cross_validation.fold_assignment: deterministic greedy whole-group bin packing by descending group size then lexical group ID
nested_cross_validation.fusion_weight_tie_break: prefer the weight closest to 0.5, then the higher structure weight
nested_cross_validation.residual_gamma_tie_break: prefer the smaller residual correction magnitude
nested_cross_validation.residual_training: Strict outer5-inner5-sub-inner cross-fitting. For each inner validation fold, the fold is removed first; residual targets for the remaining inner-training rows are then constructed by a separate whole-parent sub-inner cross-fit of M2 using only those remaining rows. A sequence residual Ridge is fit on those cross-fitted residual targets and applied to the untouched inner validation fold. Residual alpha/gamma are selected only from the resulting inner OOF predictions. The held-out outer fold is never used to construct residual targets or select alpha/gamma.

full_train_scoring_artifacts.hyperparameters: selected by parent-group CV on all 226 OPEN_TRAIN rows after nested OOF reporting
full_train_scoring_artifacts.intended_next_use: label-free scoring of V4-H research candidates before their docking geometry is consumed
